narrative.headline: What 2020 Dodge Challenger owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 20 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Electrical System (35% of reports). Some reports involve a fire or crash — read the details below.

issues.sample: THE SCREEN FOR THE STEREO CONTINUOUSLY FLASHES LIKE IT IS SHORTING AND THE TOGGLE BUTTONS CONTINUOUSLY FREEZE. WHEN TAKEN BACK TO THE DEALER, THEY SAID THERE IS NO ISSUE THAT CHRYSLER SAID I NEEDED TO MAKE SURE MY CHARGER HAD NO DUST IN IT AND MAKE SURE THE SLOT HAD NONE EITHER.
